query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Alexandria
Destination: Hurghada
Dates: 2026-07-20 to 2026-07-21
Budget: Balanced
Party: Family
Interests: Cultural Exploration, Camel Riding

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan JSON is well-formed and adheres to a logical, consistent schema with appropriate data types for all fields.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The Bella Vista Resort Hurghada is located in Hurghada, and its 4.2-star rating and description as 'mid-range hotel accommodation' are suitable for a family with a 'Balanced' budget.

results.assertion: Activities are varied and match the user's interests (history, culture, food).
results.reason: The plan includes activities like Sand City Hurghada, Mini Egypt Park, and a 'Local Culture Drive' for 'Cultural Exploration'. It also explicitly mentions 'aligning with your interest in camel riding' in the description for Sunset Horse Ranch, even if the activity itself is a horse ranch. Snorkeling, aquariums, and marina visits provide variety.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan explicitly states a 'Balanced' luxury level and provides a detailed budget breakdown totaling EGP 7370 for a 2-day family trip, which appears reasonable for a balanced budget in Hurghada, considering accommodation, activities, and food.

results.assertion: Transportation methods are practical and efficient for the region.
results.reason: The plan incorrectly assumes an origin of 'Cairo' for transport estimation ('Flights/Transport: Estimated EGP 500 (from Cairo to Hurghada)') when the user query specified 'Alexandria' as the origin. Inter-activity transport within Hurghada is not specified.

results.assertion: The plan is coherent and easy to follow.
results.reason: The plan is structured logically day-by-day with clear timings, descriptions, costs, and locations for each activity, making it easy to understand and follow.

judge_grader.reason: The travel plan specifies the origin city as Cairo, which contradicts the user's request for Alexandria.

generated_plan.trip_name: Hurghada Family Adventure: Islands, Sand & Culture
generated_plan.trip_summary: A 2-day family trip from Cairo to Hurghada, focusing on camel riding and cultural exploration, including snorkeling, sand art, and marine life discovery.

activities.title: Giftun Island Snorkeling Adventure
activities.description: Embark on an exciting boat trip to Giftun Island, renowned for its crystal-clear waters and vibrant marine life. Spend your morning snorkeling, swimming, and relaxing on the beautiful sandy beaches, a perfect blend of adventure and relaxation.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in at Bella Vista Resort Hurghada & Refresh
activities.description: Arrive at the Bella Vista Resort Hurghada, check into your comfortable accommodation, and take some time to freshen up after your morning adventure.

activities.title: Lunch at Caribbean Bar
activities.description: Savor a delightful lunch at the Caribbean Bar, offering a selection of Cafe/Patisserie specialties in a relaxed setting, conveniently located near your hotel.

activities.title: Explore Sand City Hurghada
activities.description: Discover the impressive art of sand sculpting at Sand City Hurghada, a unique open-air museum showcasing intricate designs and figures, perfect for family photos.

activities.title: Sunset Horse Ranch & Local Culture Drive
activities.description: Embrace the local culture with a visit to Sunset horse ranch hurghada for an authentic experience, aligning with your interest in camel riding. Follow this with a scenic drive or quick stops at Biedronka - Hurghada wycieczki, Happy Hurghada, and Basem to capture the essence of Hurghada's local life.

activities.title: Coastal Charm: Corniche & Orange Beach
activities.description: Enjoy a leisurely evening along the Hurghada corniche, taking in the sea breeze and vibrant atmosphere. Explore Orange beach hurghada for picturesque views and observe local marine tourism opportunities at Arafa Marine Tourism and Dolphin World Egypt.

activities.title: Dinner at Barry's Hollands Eetcafe
activities.description: Conclude your day with a delicious dinner at Barry's Hollands Eetcafe, known for its Local / International cuisine and inviting atmosphere.

activities.title: Dive into Hurghada Grand Aquarium
activities.description: Start your day by exploring the mesmerizing underwater world at the Hurghada Grand Aquarium, home to a diverse collection of marine species.

activities.title: Discover Mini Egypt Park
activities.description: Journey through Egypt's iconic landmarks in miniature at Mini Egypt Park. This unique attraction offers a glimpse of the country's rich history and architectural wonders.

activities.title: Lunch at Moby Dick Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful lunch at Moby Dick Restaurant, famous for its Local / International cuisine, located along the scenic Aldau Promenade.

activities.title: Stroll Through El Mamsha Park & Red Sea Aquarium
activities.description: Take a relaxing walk through El Mamsha Park and then visit the Red Sea Aquarium for more marine discoveries, offering a different perspective on aquatic life.

activities.title: Hurghada Marina Area & Island Views
activities.description: Explore the bustling Hurghada Marina, a hub of activity and beauty. From here, get views of Island Paradise and جزيره براديس, and don't miss the Beach Selfie Spot. You might also encounter local tour operators like David Tours Hurghada, Get Go Redsea Tours, or the area known as Urgh.

activities.title: Relaxation and Departure Preparation
activities.description: Enjoy some free time for last-minute souvenir shopping or simply relax before heading to dinner and preparing for your departure.

activities.title: Dinner at Sky restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy your final dinner in Hurghada at Sky restaurant, offering exquisite Local / International cuisine and a delightful dining experience.

budget_breakdown: Flights/Transport: Estimated EGP 500 (from Cairo to Hurghada)
Accommodation: EGP 1200 (1 night at Bella Vista Resort Hurghada)
Activities: EGP 4800 (estimated for all listed attractions)
